title: Simple Dynamite
body:
Adds a cheap explosive for your early game needs
![Throwing a Dynamite](https://github.com/Hexasan/Hexasan/blob/main/SimpleDynamite.gif?raw=true)
![Dynamite Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18fab8ceaf8e71962d38f99767045bcaa3ca1e35.png)
![TNT to Dynamite Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfa6eb4fd25e5820136348be04ee4193b9db4854.png)

**Known Issues:**
- Dynamites will leave Untextured(Black and Purple) particles
- Dynamites thrown by Dispensers won't function as expected
